{{Quote|Is that so difficult to believe, Captain Solo? Yes, we have destroyed the other suspects: Hondo Bador, Cabot Lom, Nevid d'Hon, Berille Ada—anyone Mama might have angered by helping you.|Craitheus Qreph|<ref name="Crucible (novel)">[[Crucible (novel)|''Crucible'']]</ref>}}
'''Cabet Lom''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who had a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] repair and outfitting business in [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He lived and worked in a penthouse suite in the [[Pink Sky Casino]]. Prior to [[45 ABY]], Lom was destroyed by the [[Columi/Legends|Columi]] brothers, [[Craitheus Qreph|Craitheus]] and [[Marvid Qreph]] as revenge for the death of [[Mama (information broker)|their mother]]. They did not know if Lom had killed their mother, but they knew that Lom might have been angered by Mama helping Solo in his operations. Believing that it was possible that Lom had killed Mama due to her association with Han Solo, the Qreph brothers eliminated Lom's friends and family to make sure that their mother had been avenged.
